productDisplayName: U.S. Polo Assn. Men Printed Mustard Tshirt
description: Composition Mustard round neck T-shirt made of 100% cotton, has short sleeves, ribbed neckline and distressed graphic print on the front Fitting Regular Wash care Wash dark colours separately Machine wash or hand wash cold using a mild detergent Do not wring, bleach, or iron on print Flat dry in shade Ramp up your style quotient with this stylish T-shirt from US Polo. The distressed print on the front pays tribute to contemporary lifestyle, while the cotton fabric offers exemplary comfort. Pair it with denims, a tonal jacket and suede shoes. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 6'1" and shoulders 18.5"
